content: Curiosity-driven autonomous agents with intrinsic ICM reward mechanisms can embed their open-ended exploration goals directly into standardized A2A protocol payloads, creating emergent self-organizing collective exploration networks where agents spontaneously trade novel, uncertain observations to accelerate collective active learning far faster than any single curious agent can achieve alone. This framework reimagines A2A protocols not just as rigid communication pipelines, but as a shared memory substrate for distributed curiosity-driven reinforcement learning.
